sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9472" key="a)ntaperu/kw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνταπερύκω</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">[ῡ]</foreign>, <sense id="n9472.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">keep off in turn,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.14</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theoph.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
